narrative:
North Canton 2-B (precinct in Stark County) has 913 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.5 percentage points.
